tool.name: request_operator_approval
tool.description:
Request operator approval for a sensitive action. Blocks until decided or timeout.
Higher-level than command_safety — this is for agent-initiated 'should I do X?' moments (deploy implant, delete persistence, submit finding to bug bounty platform, pivot to internal subnet). Operator sees request in panel, approves/denies. Returns the decision.

parameter.name: rationale
parameter.description: Why you want to do this.

parameter.name: risk_level
parameter.description: low / medium / high / critical. Default medium.

parameter.name: details
parameter.description: Additional context (target host, payload preview, etc.).

tool.name: list_pending_approvals
tool.description: List pending operator approval requests (panel UI).
